summary: Iteration 5 frontend testing of new /products (ORQYNE) page, nav update, /services PMaaS cross-link, and /contact prefill+submit. 15/15 review-request items verified working. End-to-end lead persistence verified via admin API (leadType='Product Inquiry (ORQYNE)' confirmed for submitted TEST_ORQ_* record).

issues: Stat data-testid slugs are derived from the first word of the LABEL (stat-rag-grounded, stat-industry, stat-from, stat-your) rather than the value or a stable semantic key. The review request had specified stat-20+, stat-3, stat-90s, stat-byok. The request allowed 'or similar slug' so this is non-blocking, but consider stable semantic ids like stat-agents, stat-cockpits, stat-time, stat-byok for better discoverability.

action_items: (Optional) Rename stat tile data-testids to stable semantic keys (stat-agents/stat-cockpits/stat-time/stat-byok) instead of label-derived slugs for clearer test selectors.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact.js inline (App.js ~L2486-2505): leadType inference via formData.subject?.startsWith('ORQYNE') is a string-coupling that will silently regress if the prefix changes; safer to read the URL ?product=orqyne param into a stable state and use that as the discriminator.
Stat tile testids use s.label.split(' ')[0].toLowerCase() — fragile if labels are ever rephrased. Prefer explicit per-stat slug.
App.js exceeds 3000 lines and embeds the entire Contact page + multiple page components — should be split into /src/pages/Contact.js etc. (already flagged in earlier iterations, restated).
test_credentials: Admin orgainse_admin / Org@iNs3-Adm!n-2026-x7P9qK (working). Generated TEST_ORQ_1779812318 contact lead during e2e submit verification.
seed_data_creation: Created one TEST_ORQ_* contact lead with leadType='Product Inquiry (ORQYNE)' and subject 'ORQYNE Product Inquiry · Professional tier'. Cleanup is recommended (filter by name prefix TEST_ORQ_ via admin delete endpoint).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Products page is lazy-loaded — always wait_for_load_state('networkidle') + ~1.5s buffer. The ORQYNE logo is inline SVG (not an image asset). Pilot CTAs use target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer' — verify by attribute, never navigate to orgainse.live in tests (treated as mock). For ServicePopup the trigger is the per-card 'Learn More' button, not the title. Contact prefill happens via useMemo over location.search (params: product=orqyne&tier=<name>&cockpit=<id>).
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found in iteration 5 scope.
